summary: The batch of synthetic samples shows a good variety of intents and difficulties, but there are missing attribute values for certain styles and intents. Additionally, there are near-duplicate phrasings and some overrepresented modes.
recommendations: Ensure to include all intents in the generation process, especially the less represented ones.
Vary the phrasing more to reduce near-duplicates and shallow paraphrases.
Encourage the generation of formal styles and more diverse scenarios.
